title: Login page accessible
description: Login form must render at /login and accept credentials

title: Form validation feedback
description: Invalid inputs must show inline error messages

title: Responsive layout
description: Pages must render correctly at 320px 768px and 1280px width

title: Keyboard navigation
description: All interactive elements must be reachable via Tab key

title: Color contrast minimum
description: Text must meet WCAG AA contrast ratio of 4.5:1

title: Session timeout warning
description: Users must see a warning 60s before session expires

title: CSRF token on forms
description: All state-changing forms must include a CSRF token
